purpose: Define the review contract to use only after the owner approves MVP-03 release-or-routing candidate review; this template does not approve any candidate, payload, manifest, routing projection, install, or publication.

requires: proves a standalone approved Skill payload is materially better than merge, recipe, reference-only, and native/runtime alternatives
has no unresolved license, provenance, security, portability, overlap, or attribution gap
requires a later manifest and approved-payload diff gate before entering skills/
proves the value is orchestration or trigger semantics rather than new Skill body text
keeps candidate out of skills/ and release-manifest.json
requires a later routing projection diff gate before generated routing changes
identifies the existing approved Skill or governed document to receive a bounded improvement
proves the merge does not create conflicting trigger logic or duplicate workflow authority
requires a later approved-payload or documentation diff gate before mutation
records why the material is useful as evidence but should not affect runtime
keeps candidate out of approved inventory, manifest, generated routing, and live environments
records the fail-closed reason and whether future rediscovery should be suppressed or allowed
keeps candidate out of approved inventory, manifest, generated routing, and live environments

fail_closed_conditions: owner approval for MVP-03 review is missing
candidate source revision or upstream hash differs from MVP-02 evidence
license, provenance, attribution, or redistribution posture is unclear
security, portability, overlap, or native/runtime equivalence review is incomplete
candidate would override repository, runtime, or human authority
candidate would enter skills/, release-manifest.json, generated routing, or live environment before its later specific gate
candidate decision is based only on enthusiasm, source popularity, or broad usefulness without evidence
